title: Design data token
description: Layer 1 — structural token shape (name + value or alias). Graph rules are Layer 2.

nameObject.description: Structured token identity. Semantic fields describe identity and structure; mode-set fields drive cascade resolution. See spec/taxonomy.md and spec/token-format.md. Additional mode-set keys MUST be strings.

property.description: Semantic: the stylistic attribute being defined (e.g. color, width, padding, gap).

structure.description: Semantic: reusable visual pattern (e.g. base, container, list). Distinct from component.

substructure.description: Semantic: child within a parent structure (e.g. item in list-item).

anatomy.description: Semantic: visible named part of a component (e.g. handle, icon, label).

object.description: Semantic: styling surface (e.g. background, border, edge, visual).

variant.description: Semantic: variant within a component (e.g. accent, negative, primary).

state.description: Semantic: interactive or semantic state (e.g. hover, focus, disabled).

orientation.description: Semantic: direction or order (e.g. vertical, horizontal).

position.description: Semantic: location relative to another object (e.g. affixed, top, bottom).

size.description: Semantic: relative t-shirt sizing (e.g. small, medium, large). Distinct from the `scale` mode set.

density.description: Semantic: space within or around component parts (e.g. spacious, compact).

from.description: Semantic: starting endpoint of a space-between measurement (e.g. top, edge, text). Paired with `to`; used with property `space-between`.

to.description: Semantic: ending endpoint of a space-between measurement (e.g. text, visual, control). Paired with `from`; used with property `space-between`.

colorScheme.description: Mode set: color scheme mode (e.g. light, dark, wireframe).

scale.description: Mode set: platform density scale (e.g. desktop, mobile).

contrast.description: Mode set: contrast level (e.g. regular, high).

legacyKey.description: Escape hatch: pins the exact flat key written to legacy output (packages/tokens/src), overriding reconstruction from the rest of this name object. Use when correcting or extending a token's decomposition would otherwise change its published legacy key.

oneOf.description: String escape hatch for tokens that cannot be expressed as a name object. Valid but triggers SPEC-017 (tech-debt warning). See token-format.md#string-name-escape-hatch.

$valueType.description: URI reference to a value-type schema under schemas/value-types/. When present, value MUST validate against the referenced schema (rule SPEC-016).

value.description: Literal value; type narrowed by value-type schemas where applicable.

deprecated.description: Spec version when token was deprecated (e.g. "3.2.0"). Truthy = deprecated.

replaced_by.description: UUID(s) of the replacement token(s). Array form requires deprecated_comment.

plannedRemoval.description: Spec version when token will be removed.

description.description: Plain text describing the token's purpose (aligns with DTCG $description).

rationale.description: Why this token has its current value. Intended for product-layer authoring context; see spec/product-context.md.

componentBindings.description: Reverse index: components that declare this token in their tokenBindings. Optional and derivable from component files.

documentBlocks.description: Typed prose blocks for this token. See spec/document-blocks.md (Phase 9).

oneOf.description: String escape hatch for tokens that cannot be expressed as a name object. Valid but triggers SPEC-017 (tech-debt warning). See token-format.md#string-name-escape-hatch.

$valueType.description: URI reference to a value-type schema under schemas/value-types/. When present, the alias resolution chain MUST terminate at a token whose value validates against this schema.

$ref.description: Alias target. In cascade format: the target token's UUID (canonical, rename-proof, resolved via uuid_index — Layer 2). In the legacy transition format: the target's kebab-case name slug.

deprecated.description: Spec version when token was deprecated (e.g. "3.2.0"). Truthy = deprecated.

replaced_by.description: UUID(s) of the replacement token(s). Array form requires deprecated_comment.

plannedRemoval.description: Spec version when token will be removed.

description.description: Plain text describing the token's purpose (aligns with DTCG $description).

rationale.description: Why this token has its current value. Intended for product-layer authoring context; see spec/product-context.md.

componentBindings.description: Reverse index: components that declare this token in their tokenBindings. Optional and derivable from component files.

documentBlocks.description: Typed prose blocks for this token. See spec/document-blocks.md (Phase 9).

componentBinding.description: A single component usage binding on a token — the reverse of tokenBindings on the component.

component.description: Component name (kebab-case). MUST match a declared component name.

context.description: Human-readable label for how this token is used in the component.
